# Operations Runbook

The standing rules for changes and access.

- **Deployments**: peer-reviewed, tested in staging, approved by an owner;
  never on a Friday afternoon.
- **Access**: time-boxed and least-privilege; standing admin is prohibited.
- **Change-freeze**: no production change during declared freeze windows
  (quarter-end, major launches) without an executive exception.
- **Incidents**: declare early, communicate often, blameless review after.
